verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi David intellectus.   Beati quorum remissæ sunt iniquitates,  et quorum tecta sunt peccata.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֗ד מַ֫שְׂכִּ֥יל אַשְׁרֵ֥י נְֽשׂוּי־פֶּ֗שַׁע כְּס֣וּי חֲטָאָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: To David himself, understanding. Blessed are they whose iniquities are forgiven, and whose sins are covered.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin opetus. Autuas on se, jonka pahat teot ovat annetut anteeksi ja jonka synnit peitetyt ovat.
verses.king_james: Blessed is he whose transgression is forgiven, whose sin is covered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus vir cui non imputavit Dominus peccatum,  nec est in spiritu ejus dolus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי־אָדָ֗ם לֹ֤א יַחְשֹׁ֬ב יְהֹוָ֣ה ל֣וֹ עָוֺ֑ן וְאֵ֖ין בְּרוּח֣וֹ רְמִיָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the man to whom the Lord hath not imputed sin, and in whose spirit there is no guile.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se ihminen, jolle Herra ei soimaa vääryyttä, jonka hengessä ei vilppiä ole.
verses.king_james: Blessed is the man unto whom the Lord imputeth not iniquity, and in whose spirit there is no guile.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tacui, inveteraverunt ossa mea,  dum clamarem tota die.
verses.douay_rheims: Because I was silent my bones grew old; whilst I cried out all the day long.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä koska minä tahdoin sitä vaieta, musertuivat minun luuni jokapäiväisestä itkustani,
verses.king_james: When I kept silence, my bones waxed old through my roaring all the day long.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam die ac nocte gravata est super me manus tua,  conversus sum in ærumna mea, dum configitur spina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ׀ יוֹמָ֣ם וָלַיְלָה֮ תִּכְבַּ֥ד עָלַ֗י יָ֫דֶ֥ךָ נֶהְפַּ֥ךְ לְשַׁדִּ֑י בְּחַרְבֹ֖נֵי קַ֣יִץ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: For day and night thy hand was heavy upon me: I am turned in my anguish, whilst the thorn is fastened.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun kätes oli yöllä ja päivällä raskas minun päälläni, niin että nesteeni kuivui: niinkuin kesällä kuivuu, Sela!
verses.king_james: For day and night thy hand was heavy upon me: my moisture is turned into the drought of summer. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Delictum meum cognitum tibi feci,  et injustitiam meam non abscondi.  Dixi : Confitebor adversum me injustitiam meam Domino ;  et tu remisisti impietatem peccati mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַטָּאתִ֨י אוֹדִ֪יעֲךָ֡ וַעֲ֘וֺנִ֤י לֹֽא־כִסִּ֗יתִי אָמַ֗רְתִּי אוֹדֶ֤ה עֲלֵ֣י פְ֭שָׁעַי לַיהֹוָ֑ה וְאַתָּ֨ה נָ֘שָׂ֤אתָ עֲוֺ֖ן חַטָּאתִ֣י סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have acknowledged my sin to thee, and my injustice I have not concealed. I said I will confess against my self my injustice to the Lord: and thou hast forgiven the wickedness of my sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden minä tunnustan sinun edessäs syntini, ja en peitä pahoja tekojani. Minä sanoin: minä tunnustan Herralle pahat tekoni; niin sinä annoit anteeksi syntini vääryyden, Sela!
verses.king_james: I acknowledged my sin unto thee, and mine iniquity have I not hid. I said, I will confess my transgressions unto the Lord; and thou forgavest the iniquity of my sin. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro hac orabit ad te omnis sanctus  in tempore opportuno.  Verumtamen in diluvio aquarum multarum,  ad eum non approximabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־זֹ֡את יִתְפַּלֵּ֬ל כׇּל־חָסִ֨יד ׀ אֵלֶיךָ֮ לְעֵ֢ת מְ֫צֹ֥א רַ֗ק לְ֭שֵׁטֶף מַ֣יִם רַבִּ֑ים אֵ֝לָ֗יו לֹ֣א יַגִּֽיעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For this shall every one that is holy pray to thee in a seasonable time. And yet in a flood of many waters, they shall not come nigh unto him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämän tähden pitää kaikkein pyhäin sinua rukoileman oikialla ajalla: sentähden kuin suuret vedenpaisumiset tulevat, ei he niihin ulotu.
verses.king_james: For this shall every one that is godly pray unto thee in a time when thou mayest be found: surely in the floods of great waters they shall not come nigh unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu es refugium meum a tribulatione quæ circumdedit me ;  exsultatio mea, erue me a circumdantibus me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֤ה ׀ סֵ֥תֶר לִי֮ מִצַּ֢ר תִּ֫צְּרֵ֥נִי רׇנֵּ֥י פַלֵּ֑ט תְּס֖וֹבְבֵ֣נִי סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou art my refuge from the trouble which hath encompassed me: my joy, deliver me from them that surround me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä olet minun varjelukseni, kätke minua murheesta, että minä pelastettuna sangen riemuisesti kerskaisin, Sela!
verses.king_james: Thou art my hiding place; thou shalt preserve me from trouble; thou shalt compass me about with songs of deliverance. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intellectum tibi dabo, et instruam te in via hac qua gradieris ;  firmabo super te oculos meos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׂכִּֽילְךָ֨ ׀ וְֽאוֹרְךָ֗ בְּדֶֽרֶךְ־ז֥וּ תֵלֵ֑ךְ אִיעֲצָ֖ה עָלֶ֣יךָ עֵינִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will give thee understanding, and I will instruct thee in this way, in which thou shalt go: I will fix my eyes upon thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä neuvon sinua ja osoitan sinulle tien, jotas vaellat: minä johdatan sinun silmilläni.
verses.king_james: I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will guide thee with mine eye.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolite fieri sicut equus et mulus,  quibus non est intellectus.  In camo et freno maxillas eorum constringe,  qui non approximant ad te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּהְי֤וּ ׀ כְּס֥וּס כְּפֶרֶד֮ אֵ֤ין הָ֫בִ֥ין בְּמֶתֶג־וָרֶ֣סֶן עֶדְי֣וֹ לִבְל֑וֹם בַּ֝֗ל קְרֹ֣ב אֵלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Do not become like the horse and the mule, who have no understanding. With bit and bridle bind fast their jaws, who come not near unto thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älkäät olko niinkuin orhiit ja muulit, joilla ei ymmärrystä ole, joille pitää suitset ja ohjat suuhun pantaman, ellei he lähene sinua.
verses.king_james: Be ye not as the horse, or as the mule, which have no understanding: whose mouth must be held in with bit and bridle, lest they come near unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multa flagella peccatoris ;  sperantem autem in Domino misericordia circumdabit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַבִּ֥ים מַכְאוֹבִ֗ים לָ֫רָשָׁ֥ע וְהַבּוֹטֵ֥חַ בַּֽיהֹוָ֑ה חֶ֝֗סֶד יְסוֹבְבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Many are the scourges of the sinner, but mercy shall encompass him that hopeth in the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalattomalla on monta vitsausta; mutta joka Herraan toivoo, hänen hyvyys ympäri piirittää.
verses.king_james: Many sorrows shall be to the wicked: but he that trusteth in the Lord, mercy shall compass him about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætamini in Domino, et exsultate, justi ;  et gloriamini, omnes recti corde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂמְח֬וּ בַיהֹוָ֣ה וְ֭גִילוּ צַדִּיקִ֑ים וְ֝הַרְנִ֗ינוּ כׇּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Be glad in the Lord, and rejoice, ye just, and glory, all ye right of heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Riemuitkaat teitänne Herrassa, ja olkaat iloiset, te vanhurskaat, ja kerskatkaat, kaikki te yksivakaiset.
verses.king_james: Be glad in the Lord, and rejoice, ye righteous: and shout for joy, all ye that are upright in heart.
